Uses of Class
neqsim.process.equipment.valve.InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer

Packages that use InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
Package
Description
neqsim.process.equipment.valve
 

  • Uses of InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer in neqsim.process.equipment.valve

    Methods in neqsim.process.equipment.valve that return InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer.setDesignPressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Set the design pressure (MAWP) of the segment that becomes exposed by the IVO.
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer.setDownstreamDesignPressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Set the design pressure of the downstream segment (for SPURIOUS_OPEN scenarios where a high-pressure source is connected to a lower-pressure system).
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer.setFrequencyPerYear(double frequency)
    Override the default initiating-event frequency.
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer.setMode(InadvertentValveOperationResult.IvoMode mode)
    Set the inadvertent operation mode to evaluate.
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer.setRole(InadvertentValveOperationResult.ValveRole role)
    Set the functional role of the valve.
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer.setUpstreamPressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Override the upstream source pressure (e.g. when the valve has not been simulated with the IVO upset condition).
